bullets.text: The US, UK, and Australia are set to develop underwater drone technology under the Aukus military pact, aiming to protect undersea cables and enhance naval defense.

A major Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo is causing alarm, with Médicins Sans Frontières warning of an unprecedented number of cases in a short period and the WHO chief visiting the worst-hit areas.
A dormitory fire at a girls' school in Kenya has killed at least 16 students, with parents awaiting updates on the tragic incident.
Australians continue to face risks in the outback, with one woman sharing her mission to prevent further deaths after losing her son and ex-husband in separate incidents.
An outback town experienced evacuations and extensive testing after students discovered vials of mercury at a local tip, raising concerns about irresponsible dumping.
Australia's truck drivers are struggling to survive as surging fuel prices have made their operations financially unsustainable, impacting an industry reliant on diesel.
SoftBank plans to invest €75bn to establish Europe’s largest AI facility in France, positioning the country as central to its global AI strategy.
The US is experiencing historic cattle shortages due to high feed costs and drought, leading to record-high beef prices as consumer demand remains strong.
Brazil has extended measures for two months to curb the rise in fuel prices, which were triggered by the conflict in the Middle East.
